nodes.name: all-types.pb
nodes.summary: Binary Protobuf test data file containing all supported field types for codec roundtrip testing.

nodes.name: monitored_partition_writer.rs
nodes.summary: Prometheus-monitored wrapper for the Iceberg fanout partitioned writer that tracks partition counts during sink writes.

nodes.name: monitored_position_delete_writer.rs
nodes.summary: Prometheus-monitored wrapper for the Iceberg position delete writer that tracks cache row counts during deletion.

nodes.name: all-types.avsc
nodes.summary: Avro schema file defining all supported primitive and complex field types for connector format testing.

nodes.name: complex-schema.avsc
nodes.summary: Complex Avro schema with nested records, arrays, maps, and union types for testing advanced connector scenarios.

nodes.name: complex-schema.json
nodes.summary: JSON Schema test fixture defining a complex object with nested properties for connector schema inference testing.

nodes.name: debezium_avro_msg_schema.avsc
nodes.summary: Avro schema for Debezium CDC message envelope format including before/after record fields and metadata.

nodes.name: simple-schema.avsc
nodes.summary: Simple Avro schema with basic primitive types for straightforward connector parsing tests.

nodes.name: test-index-array.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining MessageA and MessageH test messages with various field types for array-indexed field access testing.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_connector_with_options proc-macro crate that validates connector option structs.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Proc-macro library implementing the WithOptions derive helper attribute to enforce connector option type constraints at compile time.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_ctl (risectl) crate providing CLI commands for RisingWave cluster management.

nodes.name: await_tree.rs
nodes.summary: risectl commands for dumping and analyzing async task execution trees to identify performance bottlenecks in the cluster.

nodes.name: compute.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to retrieve and display the current configuration of a compute node via RPC.

nodes.name: compaction_group.rs
nodes.summary: risectl commands for managing Hummock compaction groups including listing, updating config, splitting, merging, and monitoring compaction status.

nodes.name: list_version_deltas.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to list Hummock version deltas for debugging LSM tree version history.

nodes.name: list_version.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to list and display Hummock SST versions including pinned versions and compaction group membership.

nodes.name: migrate_legacy_object.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to migrate legacy object store data to the new object prefix strategy during cluster upgrades.

nodes.name: pause_resume.rs
nodes.summary: risectl commands to pause and resume Hummock version checkpoint for debugging and controlled maintenance.

nodes.name: trigger_full_gc.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to manually trigger a full garbage collection pass on Hummock object store.

nodes.name: trigger_manual_compaction.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to manually trigger compaction for a specific Hummock compaction group and level.

nodes.name: meta.rs
nodes.summary: Module root for meta-related risectl commands, re-exporting sub-modules for backup, cluster info, reschedule, and other meta operations.

nodes.name: backup_meta.rs
nodes.summary: risectl commands to trigger meta service backup and restore operations for cluster disaster recovery.

nodes.name: cluster_info.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to display cluster topology information including worker nodes, fragment assignments, and actor distribution.

nodes.name: pause_resume.rs
nodes.summary: risectl commands to pause and resume streaming processing in the cluster for controlled maintenance operations.

nodes.name: MonitoredFanoutPartitionedWriterBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder for MonitoredFanoutPartitionedWriter that wraps an inner writer builder with partition count metrics.

nodes.name: MonitoredFanoutPartitionedWriter
nodes.summary: Prometheus-instrumented writer that delegates to an inner fanout partitioned writer and updates partition count metrics on each write.

nodes.name: MonitoredPositionDeleteWriterBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder for MonitoredPositionDeleteWriter that wraps an inner writer builder with cache row count metrics.

nodes.name: MonitoredPositionDeleteWriter
nodes.summary: Prometheus-instrumented position delete writer that tracks cache row counts and delegates to the inner writer.

nodes.name: derive_helper_attr
nodes.summary: Proc-macro function that generates WithOptions trait implementations asserting all struct fields satisfy the WithOptions bound.

nodes.name: dump
nodes.summary: Dumps the async task execution tree from all cluster nodes, formatting actor traces, RPC traces, and barrier traces.

nodes.name: bottleneck_detect_real_time
nodes.summary: Polls all compute nodes in real-time to collect stack traces and identifies async bottlenecks using analysis heuristics.

nodes.name: build_compaction_config_vec
nodes.summary: Builds a vector of MutableConfig entries from CLI options for updating Hummock compaction group configuration parameters.

nodes.name: list_compaction_status
nodes.summary: Lists compaction task status in tabular format showing pending tasks per compaction group, hummock context, and per-task progress.
